name: Aaron Topol
text:
Lewis, you are a gentleman, a scholar, and an old man.  You are closer to 100 than 0.  Very impressive that you have made it this long.

I am grateful that you are my partner, and that we have had the pleasure of working together for over 20 years.  You are a mentor, a friend, and a sounding board.  Thank you for your guidance, coaching, and friendship.
